home.title: Welcome
home.subtitle: My technical space: a mix of self-hosting, technical projects, and a few experiments.

useless.title: The Lab
useless.desc: Small projects to test ideas, not necessarily aiming to be useful.

fleeing-mouse.title: Catch the mouse
fleeing-mouse.subtitle: UX / Interaction
fleeing-mouse.description: A little challenge: this mouse will do anything to avoid your cursor.

wait-button.title: Waiting Button
wait-button.subtitle: UX / Interaction
wait-button.description: A button that simulates an endless wait, to test your patience and compare it with other users.

suffering.title: The sensitive button
suffering.subtitle: UX / Interaction
suffering.description: An exercise in gratuitous digital cruelty.

hex-clock.title: Hex Clock
hex-clock.tooltip: Visualization of time progression. Each bar represents a cycle (Year, Month, Day, Hour, Minute) and changes color according to its progress (0-100% on the HSL spectrum).

wait-button.new_record_warning: NEW RECORD! You are officially the person who lost the most time here!

milestones.60: One minute. You've officially entered the 'nothing to do' zone.
milestones.120: Two minutes! Your determination is as impressive as it is concerning.
milestones.300: Five minutes. I'm starting to worry about your finger.

random_pool: I saw a bird outside. You should look too.
Clicking is an art, and you're a master.
Patience is a virtue, but this is an obsession.
The progress bar is laughing at you.
Confucius say: He who holds button, holds nothing else.
Your mouse is starting to sweat.
Are you trying to prove something?
If you stop now, the button wins.
I'm actually just a script, but even I'm bored.

suffering.title: The sensitive button
suffering.description: An exercise in gratuitous digital cruelty.
phrases: Nice of you to stop by.
The screen is starting to vibrate.
Are you looking for something specific?
Don't you have anything better to do?
You are a very persistent human.
Did I do something wrong to you?
Stop, I have a family of buttons.
You wouldn't want to see an angry button.
I can feel my resistors failing.
This is harassment at this point.
My capacitors are going to blow.
You're taking advantage of my static position.
I'm stuck here and you're abusing it.
Go click on an ad instead.
I'm not responsible for my actions anymore.
Warning, I'm about to bug out.
You're going to break my code.
I'm starting to see dead pixels.
Look what you're making me do.
My lines of code are getting tangled.
I feel a short circuit coming on.
I can't feel my edges anymore.
This is the end, isn't it?
Do you really want to finish me off?
I see the white light of the backlight.
My functions are shutting down one by one.

tools.title: Public Tools
tools.desc: Some practical tools accessible to everyone.

destiny-wheel.title: Wheel of Destiny
destiny-wheel.subtitle: Let chance decide for you
destiny-wheel.description: Enter a list of choices, spin the wheel, and get a random result.

audioVisualizer.title: 3D Audio Visualizer
audioVisualizer.subtitle: 3D Audio Visualizer
audioVisualizer.description: Upload an MP3 and watch the music come to life in 3D.

portfolio.title: Projects & Portfolio
portfolio.desc: What I've built, from server infrastructure to embedded code.

owl-nest-infra.title: Owl Nest Infra
owl-nest-infra.subtitle: Docker / Raspberry Pi
owl-nest-infra.description: The entire architecture behind this site!

private.title: Private Area
private.desc: Behind the scenes. Internal server management and personal files.

protected.title: Secure Access
protected.desc: This area is protected by Authentik and Cloudflare Zero Trust.

nextcloud.title: Nextcloud
nextcloud.subtitle: Cloud Storage
nextcloud.description: My private alternative to Google Drive, installed directly on my SSD.

sonarqube.title: SonarQube
sonarqube.subtitle: Code Quality
sonarqube.description: The tool that monitors my code to track bugs and technical debt.

credits.title: Open Source Credits
credits.desc: This site was built with tools I appreciate and that move the web forward.

descriptions.mui: For components and the design system.
descriptions.traefik: The orchestrator that manages traffic to my containers.

400.title: Oops!
400.message: There is an issue with the request sent.

401.title: Identify yourself
401.message: You must be logged in to see this.

403.title: Access denied
403.message: You do not have permission to enter here.

404.title: Page not found
404.message: This area does not exist or has been moved.

408.title: It's taking a while...
408.message: The server took too long to respond.

429.title: Slow down!
429.message: Too many requests at once. Take a short break.

500.title: Server error
500.message: The system encountered an unexpected bug.

502.title: Bad gateway
502.message: The service is not responding correctly.

504.title: Timeout
504.message: The connection with the service has expired.

unknown.title: Unknown error
unknown.message: I don't know what's happening, but it's not working.
